feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How do I get and set x-csrf-token and set-cookie in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I need a CSRF token to POST to S/4HANA (CAL) using SAP Build Process automation, I am getting an error message "CSRF token validation failed".

I tried to find the cause in POSTMAN, but as you can see in the blog below, the cookie needs to be set as well with the S/4HANA version upgrade.

CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST method in Gateway Client

So we are trying the method of getting and setting the x-crsf-token and set-cookie manually. By setting the header input and output respectively in the action project, we were able to successfully retrieve and send the values and update them.

On the other hand, when I actually try to use the action in the process, it does not work and I get a 403 error. I assume that this is because the item specified as "set-cookie" in the action project has been converted to a variable called "setCookie", and the schema does not match.

Action 'd2272d2e-e5ba-4699-8a65-6e7baa2f8f36' failed with the following error: 'Error thrown from action runtime library: Failed to validate received response against output schema defined in action metadata for action Returns product master record by product number: instance.setCookie is not
instance.setCookie is not of a type(s) string

What we want to know is the following two points

  • Can we retrieve and send the value even if there is an item with a hyphen in the header?
  • Is it possible to update the cookie without setting it in some other way?

Below is what we are trying.

  • system : SAP S/4HANA 2023
  • method : PATCH
  • path : /sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product('11')
  • Success in POSTMAN and action project

Thanks,

Naoto

entry.title: Subscription to SAP Business Process Automation Failed
entry.content:
Starting a new tutorial (Create Sales Order Business Process), it led me to another tutorial (Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation Using SAP BTP Free Trial) where it gave me directions on how to create a subscription to SAP Build Process Automation.

I created a subscription to SAP Business Process Automation in my trial BTP account but the subscription failed.  The error message is: 

Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

I tried it several times and it failed each time.

In the second tutorial, I saw that the Role Collections that needed to be added to my user are:

ProcessAutomationAdmin

ProcessAutomationDeveloper

ProcessAutomationParticipant

Unfortunately, none of those are available in RoleCollections.

Any ideas and/or suggestions are gratefully appreciated.

 

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: I tried to subscribe SAP Build process Automation service, but it is failed, can you help me on this
entry.content: I have added required entitlements for SAP BPA.

entry.title: Difference between SAP Automation Pilot and SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Can anyone explain the difference between SAP Automation Pilot and SAP Build Process Automation?  Can SAP Build Apps work with either or both of these?

Thanks.

Ron

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Live Process Content Import.
entry.content: I have subscribed standard plan for sap build process automation and trying to add Live process "Procure to order" from the store . After adding it i want to understand that can we add new decisions and rules or we are just allowed to modified the existing decision /rules values?

entry.title: Web App deploy - Blank screen
entry.content:
Hi,

I deployed my web app on git hub, but the page is complete blank. The only thong it is working is the image asset, nothing else is visible.

Can you help me?

entry.title: Unable to Create SAP build Automation application on SAP BTP account
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Please i am going throught the learning journey for SAP Build on SAP BTP, following the instructions there i noticed that i couldn't subscribe to an SAP Build Process Automation application. I always get an error when i try to do so. They recommended that I ask for help here in the community. Please I would appreciate every help I can get. Thanks in advance. See error screen shot below.

entry.title: Unable to start the Active Directory via SAP BPA
entry.content: When we try to start the Application for the Active Directory it's not able to launch the Active Directory instead its opening console1 -[Console Root] Application. Screenshot attached below.

entry.title: SAP BPA automation on Entra and Active Directory
entry.content: Hi Experts- we are looking for some guidance on creating automations on Microsoft Entra and Active directory using SAP BPA. Please let know if someone has done this and has any reference documents for it.

entry.title: Unable to identify the page of One Microsoft Azure application
entry.content: While trying to capture the elements of one Microsoft Azure Application through Recorded Mode the Extracted Automation piece while try to execute it on the runtime its not able to identify the page saying "Screen failed to appear in some defined time" and at the same point of time its creating multiple instances of the same page at console and we need to first remove this duplicate instance before run.

entry.title: Agent determination with SBPA
entry.content:
We have set up a three level workflow with the SBPA using Decision Tables (Decision tables give the Approver details for all the levels)

However since last few days it is behaving incorrectly. 

Issue : 

1st level is working as expected. However for the 2nd level instead of fetching approver details from decision table, it is taking SBPA initiator Id as the approver.

In the Monitor App we are able to see the correct approver is being fetched but the email / workflow is still triggered to SBPA initiator.

We checked all the mappings  and those are accurate.

entry.title: Dedicating specific SAPGUI instance for attended automation bot
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are using attended automation for ad-hoc mass change entries using SAPGUI for SAP ECC. One of the issues we are having is that users cannot perform other SAP transactions in other screens or instances when the attended bot is running. Is there a way to bypass this?  Is there a way for an attended automation bot to only perform activities in a dedicated SAPGUI application instance and for the user to either work on existing SAP sessions or open new ones? 

Thanks,

Anand

entry.title: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination"
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have prepared a sample workflow in Build process to extract data from "CAPM" service via Action project. While running the workflow, I am getting an error message as "Failed to fetch configuration for destination '*******Service' during action execution: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination".'."

Kindly support us by resolving the issue.

entry.title: SAP RPA deployed project, triggered however hanging without an Error
entry.content:
Greetings,

Please advise on the below anomaly experienced:  

We have a Sinch RPA process which we have deployed,

  1. We trigger the process with a public form with below url:https://cotdevrpa.sap-process-automation.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/comsapspaprocessautomation.comsapspabpiprocessformtrigger/index.html?packageId=568e383c-b3ef-499c-99b9-3c14b571c0f8&packageVersionId=977bb240-174e-4c03-aa06-39af3a050e9f&formId=159e1925-51a0-456c-96f8-4e8c804fb8c0&processId=us10.4a015686trial.cotsinchrpa.sinchRPAProcess&skipStartEventWrap=false
  2. The process starts but never completes 
  3. from the monitoring tab we see the process running but doesn't complete and there are no errors 

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Build process automation subscription is not visible in service market place
entry.content: Hi All, today when I am trying to search for Sap build process automation subscription in market place it's not visible here. Please help me

entry.title: SBPA Automations not able to detect SAP Easy Access Screen
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an automation and in the first step , i have given a condition to determine whether the SAP Easy Access screen exists or not , if exists , the bot should run with that particular instance but in my case the bot is not able to recognize the Easy access screen and continue to run the automation with a new login.
But when i have already the same user open i.e. the credentials i used in the automation, the screen is getting identified.Please help me with this.

Thanks & Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: How to use Patch Action in Build Process Automation (If-Match missing)
entry.content:
For SAP Build Process Automation, I'm trying to create a patch action to update an equipment using standard S4 API API_EQUIPMENT. I'm able to get an entityset and a single entity, but unable to use the patch. It comes back with the following error "Precondition required for entity CDS~A_EQUIPMENT (If-Match missing)". 

I understand that when I do a get single, I will receive an etag that I should be able to use for the patch. When making the update call, I don't see any option to add it. I tried adding it in the parameters as a custom entry, but it keeps returning with the same error. In the backend /iwfnd/gw_client TCODE I'm able to do this call as I can add the If-Match to the header.




Does anybody know how to incorporate the If-Match in a SAP Build Patch Action?

entry.title: Looking to execute HTTP Request using body in SPA
entry.content:
I'm trying to execute an HTTP POST request by passing in the JSON body with the correct parameters but I can't seem to find a tutorial that covers that.  I've tried using the API trigger but for some reason it's not working. I can't seem to figure out how to configure it properly.  The API I'm trying to connect to is already in the BTP Destinations and I can connect through Postman.

Does anybody happen to have either a tutorial or a sample project that would get me closer to being able to accomplish my goal?  Or maybe some guidance?  😊

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: SAP Build App Bug
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm testing my application in web browser and it is working fine, able to post the data in database.

But same application if I test in SAP Build Preview App then in that case I'm getting oAuth 2 authorization issue.

I'm calling google firestore database API.

Also after login in web browser I can see all the content getting loaded successfully. But after logging in Mobile Device I'm getting logged in but not data getting displayed.

Refer below screen shot.

REST API

Data Variable Using : Bearer Token

This app works in web browser but not in SAP Build Preview App.

Information is given in this page about signing in with oAuth 2 in firebase doc.

But does anyone have idea how to get [Google_Id_Token] then please drop your answer.

curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithIdp?key=[API_KEY]' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-binary '{"postBody":"id_token=[GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN]&providerId=[google.com]","requestUri":"[http://localhost]","returnIdpCredential":true,"returnSecureToken":true}'

Any idea then please let us know.

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: Getting status 404 during RUN TEST in Process Automation, all details are correct, What to do?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having trouble in understanding the reason why RUN TEST option in create tab is showing status 404 ? All the details entered by me is correct. I have gone through the entire set up 4-5 times yet not able to find the root cause. Set up of BTP definition is correct, I have checked it thoroughly.

Right now I am using SAP Build Process Automation in free plan and instance has been created using the standard plan. My set up in create tab is also correct.

Help me out here to resolve this problem.
